commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
With him. I am content. (Haydock)
Others read with an interrogation, as if the reputation of Eliseus was not yet established. (Menochius)
Him: they go to his tent. No one ever supported the character of God's envoy, or showed his authority over the most haughty, better than Eliseus. (Calmet)
